name: UiPath
description: UiPath — enterprise RPA platform with AI-powered automation. Builds software robots that mimic human actions across desktop, web, and enterprise apps.

seo.title: UiPath — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: UiPath: UiPath — enterprise RPA platform with AI-powered automation. Builds software robots that mimic human actions across desktop, web, and enterprise apps.

when_to_use: Enterprise RPA with AI-powered automation and process mining
Building software robots for HR, finance, and IT operations
Unattended bots for 24/7 back-office process automation
Document understanding combined with RPA for invoice processing
End-to-end automation platform with citizen developer tools

pros: Largest RPA ecosystem and trained workforce
Strong AI and document understanding add-ons
Unattended and attended bots in one platform
cons: License costs scale painfully past 50 bots
Studio development still feels heavy and Windows-bound
Bot maintenance is ongoing hidden cost
API-first automation often beats UI scraping now
review.verdict: Still the enterprise RPA default, but the category is shrinking as APIs and LLMs replace screen-scraping bots.
review.best_for: Enterprises automating legacy apps with no APIs at significant scale
review.not_for: Modern API-first stacks or teams better served by workflow tools like n8n
